content:
# Angular Application Architecture

## Recommended Folder Structure
```
src/app/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ core/                    # Singleton services, guards
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ services/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth.service.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ api.service.ts
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ guards/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ auth.guard.ts
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ interceptors/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ auth.interceptor.ts
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ core.module.ts
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ shared/                  # Shared components, pipes, directives
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ components/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ button/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ modal/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pipes/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ directives/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ shared.module.ts
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ features/                # Feature modules
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ components/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ services/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ auth.module.ts
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dashboard/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ users/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ layouts/                 # Layout components
в””в”Ђв”Ђ app.component.ts
```

## Key Principles
1. **Standalone Components**: Prefer standalone over NgModules
2. **Signals**: Use signals for reactive state (Angular 16+)
3. **Lazy Loading**: Lazy load feature modules
4. **Smart/Dumb Components**: Container vs presentational
5. **OnPush Change Detection**: For better performance

## Modern Angular Pattern (v17+)
```typescript
// Standalone component with signals
@Component({
  selector: 'app-counter',
  standalone: true,
  imports: [CommonModule],
  template: `
    <button (click)="increment()">Count: {{ count() }}</button>
  `,
  changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
})
export class CounterComponent {
  count = signal(0);
  doubled = computed(() => this.count() * 2);
  
  increment() {
    this.count.update(c => c + 1);
  }
}

// Route with lazy loading
export const routes: Routes = [
  {
    path: 'dashboard',
    loadComponent: () => import('./dashboard/dashboard.component')
      .then(m => m.DashboardComponent),
    canActivate: [authGuard]
  }
];
```
